prompt: Write docs for the ObjectPool system. ObjectPool.cs manages generic pooling with IPoolable interface. PoolConfig.cs is a ScriptableObject for pool settings. PooledObject.cs handles return-to-pool lifecycle. Used for projectiles, VFX, and enemies.
assertions: Document follows the 8-section System template exactly
Document contains at least 2 Mermaid diagrams
All claims in sections 3, 4, 6, 7 have file:line citations
Known Limitations section addresses threading or main-thread constraints
